test_CV.pdf: Shi Quan is a machine learning researcher with expertise in generative and spatiotemporal models, particularly in precipitation nowcasting. He has co-authored significant papers on this topic, including "STLDM: Spatio-Temporal Latent Diffusion Model for Precipitation Nowcasting" in TMLR 2025 and "Fourier Amplitude and Correlation Loss" at NeurIPS 2024. His work involves developing PyTorch models and processing large-scale radar datasets.
